title: VoidCrafter
description: Adds a balanced crafting recipe for structure voids to minecraft.
body:
![A heading reads void crafter, abyssal vanguard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71ab970823f3b711a6d90762f73b4f91ae885b60.png)

Have you ever felt the need to add detail to your structures or control water in survival?

With this datapack, you can craft structure voids, opening up a world of possibilities for you to make your builds.

Whether you're a beginner builder, master builder, or PVP boss, you'll be able to use this previously-restricted block to take your creations up a _notch_!

_Made by MeowingChip5 (erl)_
